since_last: 17% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads -0.72%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 17% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.20% · BTC -1.95% · Gold -0.34% · Nasdaq100 -2.59%. 17% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at -0.72%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.72%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -9.85%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.15% at $124.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
